body:
This PR:
 - Breaks up our tests into separate jobs to parallelize the work
 - Removes `test/test_cases.jl`, since the calls in here have been moved to the separate files
 - Remove GHA CI from bors (we'll still run on GHA, but passing CI doesn't depend on its success)
 - Adds a `test/Project.toml`

This PR also adds
```julia
if !haskey(ENV, "BUILDKITE")
    import Pkg
    Pkg.develop(Pkg.PackageSpec(; path = ...))
end
```
To the test scripts to ensure users don't accidentally fallback on the latest release of ClimaAtmos.
title: Parallelize CI

body:
Thermodynamic states are not currently designed to be captured (i.e., we should not make fields of them) as that will duplicate the parameter set.

We can change this by removing parameter sets from the thermodynamic states, but for now this is a better design (will be more performant) and doesn't seem problematic.
title: Don't capture thermodynamic states
